recommendations.title: Deep
recommendations.overview: Four insomniac med school students are lured into a neuroscience experiment that spirals out of control and must find a way out before it’s too late.
recommendations.director: Thanabodee Uawithya, Jetarin Ratanaserikiat, Apirak Samudkitpaisan, Sita Likitvanichkul, Adirek Watleela

recommendations.title: The Trixxer
recommendations.overview: A mysterious serial killer is shocking the underworld. Scotland Yard is investigating the case. Clues lead the detectives to Blackwhite Castle.

recommendations.title: Just Cause
recommendations.overview: A Harvard professor is lured back into the courtroom after twenty-five years to take the case of a young black man condemned to death for the horrific murder of a child.

recommendations.title: Haseen Dillruba
recommendations.overview: Under investigation as a suspect in her husband's murder, a wife reveals details of their thorny marriage that seem to only further blur the truth.

recommendations.title: Viking Wolf
recommendations.overview: After witnessing a grotesque murder at a party in her new town, a teenager starts having strange visions and bizarre desires.

recommendations.title: Ratsasan
recommendations.overview: A serial killer is murdering school girls, and a newbie cop has to track him down before the victim count increases.
